mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, MIN(s.price) AS minPrice, MAX(s.price) AS maxPrice, IFNULL(SUM(s.stock), 0) AS totalStock FROM pms_product p LEFT JOIN pms_sku_stock s ON p.id = s.product_id
p.is_deleted = 0 AND (s.is_deleted = 0 OR s.is_deleted IS NULL)
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
